commands.review_summary:
The PR centralizes Control UI approval prompt cleanup and dismissal, moves Discord exec approval button acknowledgement earlier, and changes model manifest/default alias normalization paths.

PR surface: Source +328, Tests +579. Total +907 across 20 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main keeps stale resolve failures in execApprovalError and only removes resolved events from the queue. I did not run a pre-fix failing browser or Discord scenario in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Maintainer or author handling is needed because the PR is protected and dirty, and the remaining work combines a line-level Discord response fix with compatibility-sensitive rebase review.
